query:
INSERT INTO properties (title, description, propertyType, price, priceEur, sizeSqm, bedrooms, bathrooms, features, images, listingType, featured, fazwazUrl) VALUES 
('(275) 2-Bedroom House Expansive Garden Mountain View Beauty', 'Single-storey house, featuring a spacious 460 SqM interior on a near-equal 456 SqM plot — one of the most balanced indoor/outdoor ratios you''ll find at this price point in Sam Roi Yot. Available at ฿3,500,000 with government rate utilities keeping ongoing costs to a minimum. The house offers 2 bedrooms and 2 bathrooms with stunning mountain views and an expansive outdoor area ideal for a garden, sala, or simply enjoying the natural surroundings. All pets are welcome and furniture is negotiable, making this a genuinely flexible buy-and-move-in opportunity.', 'house', 3500000, 95300, 460, 2, '2', JSON_ARRAY('mountainView', 'garden', 'pets', 'furnished'), JSON_ARRAY('/house_u6081318_main.webp'), 'sale', 0, 'https://www.fazwaz.com/property-sales/2-bedroom-house-for-sale-in-sam-roi-yot-hua-hin-u6081318')
